universal_semantic_rules.logic: IF path in CORE and rule is secret
universal_semantic_rules.audit_rationale: Audit Conclusion: Confirmed secret patterns inside runtime application logic represent direct credential exposure. Active production material.

universal_semantic_rules.logic: IF path in TEST and rule is secret
universal_semantic_rules.audit_rationale: Audit Conclusion: Mock Data Exposure. Secrets detected exclusively in test fixtures are classified as Non-production artifacts.

universal_semantic_rules.logic: IF path in DOCS and rule is secret
universal_semantic_rules.audit_rationale: Audit Conclusion: Hardcoded example credentials in documentation represent illustrative placeholders. Classified as Non-production artifact.

universal_semantic_rules.logic: IF path in CORE and rule is subprocess/shell
universal_semantic_rules.audit_rationale: Audit Conclusion: shell=True or equivalent dynamic command execution inside production modules creates injection attack surface.

universal_semantic_rules.logic: IF path in INFRA and rule is subprocess/shell
universal_semantic_rules.audit_rationale: Audit Conclusion: Operational Necessity. Command execution inside CI/CD or packaging scripts is limited to trusted pipeline context.

universal_semantic_rules.logic: IF path in CORE and rule is eval/exec
universal_semantic_rules.audit_rationale: Audit Conclusion: Dynamic code execution (eval/exec) in runtime logic enables remote code execution. Structural design flaw.

universal_semantic_rules.logic: IF path in CORE and rule is smart contract execution
universal_semantic_rules.audit_rationale: Audit Conclusion: Unsafe delegatecall or reentrancy in smart contracts may cause irreversible asset loss. Fundamental execution risk.

universal_semantic_rules.logic: IF path in CORE and rule is B101
universal_semantic_rules.audit_rationale: Audit Conclusion: Assertions removed in optimized runtime can disable security validation logic.

universal_semantic_rules.logic: IF path in TEST and rule is B101
universal_semantic_rules.audit_rationale: Audit Conclusion: Noise. Use of 'assert' in test suites is standard practice. Compliant with secure development as test artifacts are not deployed.

universal_semantic_rules.logic: IF path in INFRA and rule is Terraform/IaC
universal_semantic_rules.audit_rationale: Audit Conclusion: Public exposure of storage or unrestricted ingress represents infrastructure misconfiguration.

universal_semantic_rules.logic: IF path in TEST and rule is Terraform/IaC
universal_semantic_rules.audit_rationale: Audit Conclusion: Vulnerable-by-Design Artifact. Infrastructure-as-Code files exist solely to test scanner efficacy.

universal_semantic_rules.logic: IF path in CORE and rule is B108
universal_semantic_rules.audit_rationale: Audit Conclusion: Static temporary file usage represents limited local privilege escalation vector. Hygiene improvement required.

universal_semantic_rules.logic: IF path in INFRA (github/compose) and rule is secret
universal_semantic_rules.audit_rationale: Audit Conclusion: Secrets embedded in CI configuration expose supply chain pipeline. Enables repository compromise.
